name: CLM_RLT_COND_CD
title: Claim Related Condition Code
description: This code indicates information about how a claim should be processed.

concept.display: PATIENT COVERED BY INSURANCE NOT REFLECTED HERE
ESRD PATIENT IN FIRST 30 MONTHS OF ENTITLEMENT COVERED BY EMPLOYER GROUP HEALTH INSURANCE
TREATMENT OF NON-TERMINAL CONDITION FOR HOSPICE PATIENT

NEITHER PATIENT NOR SPOUSE IS EMPLOYED
PATIENT AND/OR SPOUSE IS EMPLOYED BUT NO EGHP COVERAGE EXISTS OR (EFF 9/93) OTHER EMPLOYER SPONSORED/PROVIDED HEALTH INSURANCE COVERING PATIENT.
THE DISABLED BENEFICIARY AND/OR FAMILYMEMBER HAS NO GROUP COVERAGE FROM A LGHP OR (EFF 9/93) OTHER EMPLOYER SPONSORED/PROVIDED HEALTH INSURANCE
PAYER CODE/NOT CURRENTLY USED BY MEDICARE.
PAYER CODE/NOT CURRENTLY USED BY MEDICARE.
PAYER CODE/NOT CURRENTLY USED BY MEDICARE.
PAYER CODE/CLEAN CLAIM IS DELAYED IN CMS PROCESSING SYSTEM.
PATIENT IS HOMELESS (EFF. 3/07). PRIOR TO3/07, CODE INDICATED PATIENT IS OVER 100 YEARS OLD - PATIENT WAS OVER 100 YEARS OLD AT THE DATE OF ADMISSION.
HOME IV PATIENT ALSO RECEIVING HHA SERVICES
VA ELIGIBLE PATIENT CHOOSES TO RECEIVE SERVICES IN A MEDICARE CERTIFIED FACILITY
PATIENT REFERRED TO A SOLE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL FOR A DIAGNOSTIC LABORATORY TEST
PATIENT AND/OR SPOUSE'S EGHP IS SECONDARY TO MEDICARE
DISABLED BENEFICIARY AND/OR FAMILY MEMBER'S LGHP IS SECONDARY TO MEDICARE
PACE ELIGIBLE PATIENT DISENROLLS DURING AN INPATIENT ADMISSION (EFFECTIVE 1/1/24)
GENERAL CARE PATIENT IN A SPECIAL UNIT
PARTIAL HOSPITALIZATION - EFF 3/92,INDICATES CLAIM IS FOR PARTIAL HOSPITALIZATION SERVICES. FOR OP SERVICES, THIS INCLUDES A VARIETY OF PSYCH PROGRAMS.
CONTINUING CARE NOT RELATED TO INPATIENTADMISSION - CONTINUING CARE NOT RELATEDTO THE CONDITION OR DIAGNOSIS FOR WHICHTHE BENEFICIARY RECEIVED INPATIENTHOSPITAL SERVICES. (EFF. 10/01)

CONTINUING CARE NOT PROVIDED WITHINPRESCRIBED POSTDISCHARGE WINDOW -CONTINUING CARE WAS RELATED TO THEINPATIENT ADMISSION BUT THE PRESCRIBEDCARE WAS NOT PROVIDED WITHIN THE POST-DISCHARGE WINDOW.(EFF. 10/01)

INPATIENT ADMISSION CHANGED TO OUTPATIENT -FOR USE ON OUTPATIENT CLAIMS ONLY, WHEN THE PHYSICIAN ORDERED INPATIENT SERVICES, BUT UPON INTERNAL REVIEW PERFORMED BEFORE THE CLAIM WAS INITIALLY SUBMITTED, THE HOSPITALDETERMINED THE SERVICES DID NOT MEET ITS INPATIENT CRITERIA. (EFF. 4/1/04)

NON AVAILABILITY STATEMENT ON FILE FOR CHAMPUS CLAIM FOR NON-EMERGENCY IP CARE FOR CHAMPUS BENE RESIDING WITHIN THE CATCHMENT AREA (USUALLY A 40 MILE RADIUS) OF A UNIFORM SERVICES HOSPITAL.TRANSFER FROM ANOTHER HOME HEALTH AGENCY.(EFF. 7/1/10)
TRANSFER FROM ANOTHER HOME HEALTH AGENCY (EFF. 7/1/10)
PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT CENTERS FOR CHILDREN AND ADOLESCENTS (RTCS)
PRODUCT REPLACEMENT FOR KNOWN RECALL OF A PRODUCT (EFF. 4/2006)
ATTESTATION OF UNRELATED OUTPATIENT NONDIAGNOSTIC SERVICES (EFFECTIVE 4/1/11)
INITIAL PLACEMENT OF A MEDICAL DEVICE PROVIDED AS PART OF A CLINICAL TRIAL OR A FREE SAMPLE (EFFECTIVE 7/1/15)
NO SKILLED HOME HEALTH VISITS IN BILLING PERIOD. POLICY EXCEPTION DOCUMENTED AT THE HOME HEALTH AGENCY (EFFECTIVE 7/1/16)
PAYMENT OF SNF CLAIMS FOR BENEFICIARIES DISENROLLING FROM TERMINATING M+C PLANS. PLANS WHO HAVE NOT MET THE 3-DAY HOSPITAL STAY REQUIREMENT (EFF. 10/1/00)
PAYER CODE/BYPASS CWF EDITS FOR INCARCERATED BENEFICIARIES. INDICATES SERVICES RENDERED TO A PRISONER OR A PATIENT IN STATE OR LOCAL CUSTODY MEETS THE REQUIREMENT OF 42 CFR 411.4(B) FOR PAYMENT.
OUTLIER NOT CLAIMED - BILL MAY MEET THE CRITERIA FOR COST OUTLIER, BUT THE HOSPITAL DID NOT CLAIM THE COST OUTLIER (PPS)
BENEFICIARY ELECTS NOT TO USE LIFE TIME RESERVE (LTR) DAYS
BENEFICIARY ELECTS TO USE LIFE TIME RESERVE (LTR) DAYS
SELF-ADMINISTERED EPO - BILLING IS FOR A HOME DIALYSIS PATIENT WHO SELF ADMINISTERS EPO.
FULL CARE IN UNIT - BILLING IS FOR A PATIENT WHO RECEIVED STAFF ASSISTED DIALYSIS SERVICES IN A HOSPITAL OR RENAL DIALYSIS FACILITY.
SELF CARE IN UNIT - BILLING IS FOR A PATIENT WHO MANAGED HIS OWN DIALYSIS SERVICES WITHOUT STAFF ASSISTANCE IN A HOSPITAL OR RENAL DIALYSIS FACILITY.
SELF CARE TRAINING - BILLING IS FOR SPECIAL DIALYSIS SERVICES WHERE THE PATIENT AND HELPER (IF NECESSARY) WERE LEARNING TO PERFORM DIALYSIS.
HOME-PROVIDERS ENTER THIS CODE TO INDICATE THE BILLING IS FOR A PATIENT WHO RECEIVED DIALYSIS SERVICES AT HOME
HOME 100% REIMBURSEMENT -(NOT TO BE USED FOR SERVICES AFTER 4/15/90) THE BILLING IS FOR HOME DIALSIS PATIENT USING A DIALYSIS MACHINE THAT WAS PURCHASEDUNDER THE 100% PROGRAM.
BACK-UP FACILITY - BILLING IS FOR A PATIENT WHO RECEIVED DIALYSIS SERVICES IN A BACK-UP FACILITY.
PROVIDER ACCEPTS OR IS OBLIGATED/REQUIRED DUE TO A CONTRACTUAL ARRANGEMENT OR LAW TO ACCEPT PAYMENT BY A PRIMARY PAYER AS PAYMENT IN FULL.
NEW COVERAGE NOT IMPLEMENTED BY HMO -EFF 3/92, INDICATES NEWLY COVERED SERVICE UNDER MEDICARE FOR WHICH HMO DOES NOT PAY.
HOME DIALYSIS-NURSING FACILITY – HOME DIALYSIS FURNISHED IN A SNF OR NURSING FACILITY (REPORT WITH CONDITION CODE 74)
DELAYED RECERTIFICATION OF HOSPICE TERMINAL ILLNESS (EFFECTIVE 1/1/17)
ADDITIONAL HEMODIALYSIS TREATMENTS WITH MEDICAL JUSTIFICATION (EFFECTIVE DATE TBD)
ALLOGENEIC STEM CELL TRANSPLANT RELATED DONOR CHARGES (EFFECTIVE 7/1/20)
PAYER CODE/DATA ASSOCIATED WITH DRG 468 HAS BEEN VALIDATED.
HOSPITAL SERVICES PROVIDED IN A MOBILE FACILITY OR WITH PORTABLE UNITS (EFFECTIVE 4/1/20)
ABORTION PERFORMED DUE TO SERIOUS FETAL GENETIC DEFECT, DEFORMITY, OR ABNORMALITY (EFF. 10/1/02)
ABORTION PERFORMED DUE TO A LIFE ENDANGERING PHYSICAL CONDITION (EFF. 10/1/02)
ABORTION PERFORMED DUE TO PHYSICAL HEALTH OF MOTHER THAT IS NOT LIFE ENDANGERING (EFF. 10/1/02)
ABORTION PERFORMED DUE TO EMOTIONAL/PSYCHOLOGICAL HEALTH OF THE MOTHER (EFF. 10/1/02)

AUTOMATIC APPROVAL AS BILLED BASED ON FOCUSED REVIEW- NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X). (NO LONGER USED FOR MEDICARE).
PARTIAL APPROVAL - NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X).
ADMISSION/SERVICES DENIED - NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X).
POST PAYMENT REVIEW APPLICABLE - NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X).
ADMISSION PREAUTHORIZATION - NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X).
EXTENDED AUTHORIZATION - NOTE: BEGINNING JULY 2005, THIS CODE IS RELEVANT TO TYPE OF BILLS OTHER THAN INPATIENT(18X, 21X, 22X, 32X, 33X, 34X, 75X, 81X, 82X).
